category_sources: Official SourceForge project page describes Daemonlogger as a packet logger and soft tap developed by Martin Roesch.
source_facts.description says daemonlogger is a network packet logger and soft tap daemon.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page heading uses Daemonlogger.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official SourceForge project page; it is the best official documentation surface found for the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project page provides files, support, and mailing lists, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge project page describes libpcap-based logging and soft-tap runtime modes.
source_facts.description says it is a network packet logger and soft tap daemon.
